subcodes.first_line: O Thou loving God! Thy friends are self-sacrificing, and Thy loved ones diffuse radiance abroad. They are captives of Thy love and seekers of refuge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای يزدان مهربان ياران جانفشانند و دوستان پرتو افشان اسير محبتند و مستجير
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @humility; meekness; lowliness
